references.text: Nickrent, DL, V Malécot, R Vidal-Russell & JP Der. 2010. A revised classification of Santalales. Taxon 59: 538-558
Sleumer, H. 1984. Olacaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 10: 1-29

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 20 April 2024

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 1193 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 117; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 10 (1984) 10.
species.distribution: Africa, America, Andaman Isls, Australia, Bangladesh, Bismarck Arch, Borneo, Caribbean, India, Indian Ocean, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Myanmar, New Caledonia, New Guinea, Nicobar Isls, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Solomon Isls, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. BASILAN, BILIRAN, CAWILI, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Davao, Davao del Sur, Misamis Oriental (photos), MINDORO, PALAWAN (photos), TAKLONG (photos), TAWI-TAWI, TICAO (photos).
species.notes: In thickets along the shore or dry forest. 0m.
